message:
🌱 Add dify: Metadata filter for external knowledge base mission (#857)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "dify-16349-add-metadata-filter-support-for-external-knowledge-base",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "dify: Add metadata filter support for external knowledge base",
+    "description": "Add metadata filter support for external knowledge base. Requested by 10+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current dify setup",
+        "description": "Verify your dify deployment is running:\n```bash\ndocker compose ps\n```\nThis feature requires a working dify installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review the feature request",
+        "description": "Users with external knowledge bases (e.g., Milvus) need metadata filter support to implement features like document-level filtering. The existing metadata filtering logic had an unassigned variable issue and only worked for internal datasets."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the metadata filter support",
+        "description": "The fix includes three improvements:\n\n1. Fixed the `get_metadata_filter_condition` function to resolve the unassigned variable issue in the metadata filtering condition logic\n2. Refined the `DatasetRetrieverTool` invocation to allow flexible metadata filtering through all `metadata_filtering_mode` options (now works for both internal and external datasets)\n3. Related improvements for metadata handling consistency\n\nUpgrade to the dify version that includes this feature."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.\nConfirm that metadata filters work correctly for both internal and external knowledge bases."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Improved the metadata filtering condition logic to fix an unassigned variable issue and extended the DatasetRetrieverTool to support flexible metadata filtering for both internal and external datasets.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "dify",
+      "community",
+      "ai-app",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "dify"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "community",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/langgenius/dify/issues/16349",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/langgenius/dify",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/langgenius/dify/pull/19208"
+    },
+    "reactions": 10,
+    "comments": 5,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "tools": [
+      "docker",
+      "docker-compose"
+    ],
+    "description": "Docker and Docker Compose for running dify. Alternatively, a Kubernetes cluster for K8s-based deployment."
+  },
